title: UK social media ban could cut lifeline for disabled children, campaigners warn
description: Activists say blanket ban could prevent teenagers from finding peers and role models with similar conditions
content:
Disability activists have said banning under-16s from social media risks cutting off a “lifeline for friendship” for disabled children and could push them into social isolation by preventing them from making connections online.

title: The tide is turning on Thames Water: special administration looks best
description: It is still not totally clear what the government wants but the political mood seems to be shifting towards a decision

title: Murdered Preston Davey's dad tells of anguish at vigil for son
description: Gary Nolan spoke of the "terror" his son endured as tributes were paid at a vigil for the baby.
content:
The biological father of murdered Preston Davey has attended a candlelit vigil in memory of his son and told how the baby was subjected to months of "terror at the hands of a monster".

title: Ex-Arsenal & Liverpool midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain marries Little Mix popstar Perrie Edwards at stunning wedding ceremony attended by Mason Mount & Danny Welbeck
description: Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain and Perrie Edwards marry in a star-studded wedding featuring guests like Mason Mount and Danny Welbeck.
